MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul D. Singer, Esq. appeared with Josh Pebet for plaintiff Trophy Properties. Limited Scope Attorney Sebastian Elan Kaplan-Sears, Esq. appeared for and with defendants Miguel Diaz and Angelica Montes

Settlement Conference Held. Case Settled. Parties sign off on Stipulation for Entry of Judgment as to premises located at 1855 10th Avenue, #20, San Francisco, California. Original retained by plaintiff. Trial date vacated.

Hon Frank Drago/Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)
